themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Tremble, thou earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob; After...". Word-study detail reinforces "אָ֑רֶץ: thou earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Judah was his sanctuary, and Israel his dominion. This verse declares the Exodus's ultimate p...". Word-study detail reinforces "מַמְשְׁלוֹתָֽיו׃: his dominion - rule; also (concretely in plural) a realm or a ruler".
